meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity SaaS Template: A Freelancer’s Guide to Shipping
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with SaaS architecture. Use this advanced Antigravity project template and Claude Code workflow to ship professional-grade apps at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: The 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier is a bottleneck you can bypass using the Antigravity project template. By leveraging pre-configured, production-ready boilerplate and orchestrating development with Claude Code, you transform complex architecture into a repeatable, high-speed assembly line, allowing you to ship professional SaaS products for clients in record time.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client’s deadline, and the blank IDE screen is a silent enemy. You have the design vision, but the underlying SaaS architecture feels like a labyrinth of authentication, database schemas, and API middleware that you haven't mastered yet. Every hour spent debugging boilerplate is an hour you aren't billing for high-value features.

Relief has arrived in the form of the Antigravity project template. This is not just code; it is a battle-tested foundation designed for high-velocity freelancers. By pairing this template with the autonomous precision of Claude Code, you shift from manual coding to architectural orchestration, effectively turning a week of setup into a two-hour launch sequence.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture. This step ensures your project has the necessary environment variables and folder structure pre-configured for production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project scaffold using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Clerk authentication.

steps.title: Define Domain Schema
steps.description: Translate client requirements into a robust database schema without writing manual SQL migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including User, Organization, Subscription, and Project entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on user-project-org relationship'

steps.title: Orchestrate API Endpoints
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your schema to serverless API routes, ensuring typed safety across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Next.js API routes for CRUD operations on the Project model, implementing role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement secure API routes for project management with RBAC'

steps.title: Inject UI Components
steps.description: Rapidly deploy the frontend using the template's pre-styled component library to maintain aesthetic consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a dashboard view using the Antigravity UI library, including a sidebar, header, and data table for managing projects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build dashboard UI components using existing design system'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Automate the CI/CD pipeline to push your build to a live environment with zero-downtime configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Vercel deployment settings and environment variable injection for the production database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup production deployment pipeline and environment secrets'

pro_tips: Always use 'claude commit' with a detailed context flag to keep your git history professional enough for client audit trails.
Pre-define your UI theme in the Antigravity config file before generating components to ensure 100% brand alignment.
Use Claude Code to write integration tests for your auth flows immediately after generating the routes to prevent regression.
Leverage the Antigravity 'mock-data' generator during local development to speed up frontend UI testing.
Keep your prompt library saved in a local folder; use Claude to reference these 'golden prompts' to maintain consistent code quality across multiple client projects.
content.next_steps: Once the base is live, focus on integrating a payment provider like Stripe using the Antigravity billing module to finalize your MVP.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow to stop reinventing the wheel and start scaling your freelance business. Stop coding from scratch and start orchestrating your success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
